name: intro-generator-monster
description: Standalone Intro Generator (Monster) — AI-generated founder intros with a no-auth admin dashboard.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix admin install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix admin install && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix admin run build
